side_effects.description: Day 1: itching near tesamorelin injection site. Day 2-3: increased itching, hives around injection site. Day 3+: extreme itching on feet, palms, and lips.

protocol_notes: Started tesamorelin approximately 1 month before semaglutide. Combined dosing (tesamorelin + semaglutide) on day 1 triggered reaction. Tesamorelin discontinued during semaglutide course. Restarted tesamorelin 1 week after final semaglutide dose with small reaction. No reaction noted 2+ weeks after last semaglutide injection. Reaction appeared to be related to combination or timing of both peptides.
